name: Appsmith
description: Platform to build admin panels, internal tools, and dashboards
compose:
name: slashnode-appsmith
services:
  app:
    image: appsmith/appsmith-ce:v2.1
    container_name: appsmith
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      APPSMITH_ENCRYPTION_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      APPSMITH_ENCRYPTION_SALT: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/appsmith-stacks
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8654:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-appsmith_app_data-app
